spec.description: Common exporter health dashboard for exporters built with prometheus-exporter-framework.

spec.title: Scrape Status
spec.description: Ratio of currently reachable exporter targets for the selected Prometheus job.

spec.title: Exporter Targets
spec.description: Number of targets scraped under the selected job.

spec.title: Max Scrape Duration
spec.description: Slowest current scrape duration among exporter targets.

spec.title: Scrape Samples
spec.description: Samples kept after metric relabeling across exporter targets.

spec.title: Exporter Runtime Snapshot
spec.description: Per-instance build and runtime metadata from common exporter metrics.

spec.title: Exporter Scrape Up
spec.description: Prometheus up metric for each exporter target.

spec.title: Exporter Scrape Duration
spec.description: Prometheus scrape duration for each exporter target.

spec.title: Exporter Scrape Samples
spec.description: Prometheus scrape sample counts before and after metric relabeling.

spec.title: Exporter CPU
spec.description: Exporter process CPU usage over time.

spec.title: Exporter Memory
spec.description: Resident memory and Go heap memory over time.

spec.title: Exporter Open FDs
spec.description: Open file descriptors and process limit when exposed by the platform.

spec.title: Prometheus Exporter Framework Overview

spec.name: job
spec.label: job
spec.description: Prometheus scrape job exposing exporter metrics
